---
title: "About StatiX AI & Data Labs"
description: "Professional learning resources for bioinformatics, clinical programming, and data science."
---

## Our mission

**StatiX AI & Data Labs** is a curated learning platform for students and professionals in life sciences, pharmaceuticals, and data-driven healthcare.

We publish tutorials that read like **official documentation** — practical, reproducible, and aligned with how industry teams actually work.

---

## Who this site is for

| Audience | What you will find |
|----------|-------------------|
| **Students** | Step-by-step guides from zero prior knowledge |
| **Bioinformatics researchers** | Docker, Nextflow, cloud pipelines |
| **Clinical programmers** | Reproducible R environments, ADaM workflows (expanding) |
| **Data scientists** | Containers, orchestration, ML deployment paths |
| **Pharmaceutical professionals** | GxP-aware practices, reproducibility, audit-friendly patterns |
| **Software engineers** | DevOps foundations for regulated data platforms |

---

## Documentation standard

Every StatiX tutorial follows a **25-section professional template**:

1. Introduction  
2. Learning objectives  
3. Why it matters (industry context)  
4. Architecture diagrams (Mermaid)  
5. Installation (Windows, macOS, Linux)  
6. Basic concepts  
7. Hands-on examples  
8. Real-world use cases  
9. Bioinformatics workflow placement  
10. Clinical programming workflow placement  
11. Best practices  
12. Common mistakes  
13. Troubleshooting  
14. Interview questions  
15. Cheat sheet  
16. Summary  
17. Next topic  
18. Learning paths  
19. Further reading  
20. Mini project  
21. Exercises  

::: {.callout-tip}
**Available now:** [Docker](docker.qmd) and [Nextflow](nextflow.qmd) use the full template. Other topics are rolling out on the same standard.
:::

---

## Recommended learning paths

### Bioinformatics

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Linux] --> B[Git]
  B --> C[Docker]
  C --> D[Nextflow]
  D --> E[Cloud / AWS]
  E --> F[ML & AI]
```

### Clinical programming

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[R / SAS] --> B[Linux & Git]
  B --> C[Docker]
  C --> D[Pharmaverse]
  D --> E[Reproducible TLFs]
  E --> F[Submission]
```

### Data science & engineering

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Python / R] --> B[SQL]
  B --> C[Linux & Git]
  C --> D[Docker]
  D --> E[Kubernetes]
  E --> F[AWS]
```

---

## How to use this site

1. Start on the [home page](index.qmd) — check **Available** vs **Coming soon** badges  
2. Follow tutorials in order if you are new to a path  
3. Complete **hands-on examples** and **mini projects** on your machine  
4. Use **cheat sheets** and **troubleshooting** sections as job aids  

---

## Contribute & feedback

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and published via GitHub Pages.

Repository: [https://github.com/praveen2093/QUARTO](https://github.com/praveen2093/QUARTO)

Live site: [https://praveen2093.github.io/QUARTO/](https://praveen2093.github.io/QUARTO/)

[Back to home](index.qmd)
